title: Login with Mobile Number and OTP
description: Verify that a user can successfully log into the application using a valid mobile number and OTP verification flow.
preconditions: User is on the login/landing screen

steps.description: 2. Enter '9876543210' in the mobile number input field
4. Verify that the OTP verification screen is displayed
5. Enter '123456' in the OTP input field
6. Tap on the 'Verify and Proceed' button
7. Verify that the home screen is displayed

expected_result: User should be successfully authenticated and redirected to the app's home dashboard.
